since_last: 34% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.90%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.29% · Gold +0.07% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 34% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.90%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.90%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -5.86%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.49%, INTC +3.73%, SMCI +3.56%, CGNX +2.30%, TSM +2.15%. Laggards: SPCX -5.86%, SAP -3.25%, APP -2.07%, GOOGL -1.64%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.86% at $174.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
